overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a medieval wizarding common room with stone walls, wooden beams, and magical decor. The player moves through the space encountering student NPCs and a translucent ghost, with warm lighting from fireplaces and tall gothic windows. High-quality game engine footage resembling a Harry Potter universe setting.

events.description: translucent ghost of a man in medieval clothing materializes and walks through the center of the room

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the common room entrance toward the central seating area, passing the large metal sphere structure

notable_agents.action: ghost walking through the room from right to left, passing through the camera's path
group of students in dark robes standing and conversing near the far windows

entered.detail: large ornate metal armillary sphere with intricate rings on a wooden stand
tall floor lamp with fringed white shade and brass base
tall dark wood bookshelves built into the stone wall
large ornate red and gold patterned rug covering the stone floor
tall gothic arched windows with multiple panes letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a high-ceilinged gothic common room with stone walls and wooden beams. The camera moves forward past a large metal armillary sphere on the right while a translucent ghost walks through the center of the room. Students in robes stand conversing in the distance near tall gothic windows that illuminate the space with natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: central seating area with study tables

agents.ego_description: continuing through the main hall toward the fireplace, passing central tables and seating

entered.detail: large dark wood rectangular table with chairs arranged around it
antique terrestrial globe on a wooden stand sitting on the central table
large stone fireplace with carved mantelpiece and hanging banners above
long red and gold vertical banner with house insignia hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the common room, the camera approaches a central study table with an antique globe. The large stone fireplace becomes visible on the left wall, adorned with red and gold house banners. The armillary sphere falls behind as the camera advances toward the seating area.

events.description: camera turns left to circle around the fireplace seating area, changing direction from forward to leftward

agents.ego_description: turning left to circle around the fireplace area, observing students sitting in the armchairs

notable_agents.action: student sitting in leather armchair reading a book near the warm fireplace

entered.detail: wooden writing desks with inkwells and scattered papers
ornate brass floor lamp with glowing white shade illuminating the seating area
large woven tapestries depicting medieval scenes hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to circle the large stone fireplace where students sit reading in leather armchairs. Study tables with writing materials become visible on the left side of the room, while the central table with the globe moves out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: quiet study area with large windows

agents.ego_description: walking along the left side of the room past students studying at wooden tables near the tall windows

notable_agents.action: student sitting alone at a wooden table reading, with books spread out before them

entered.detail: tall carved wooden cabinet with glass doors displaying various objects

segments.scene_description: Moving along the left wall, the camera passes through a quieter study area where students sit reading at wooden tables illuminated by tall windows. The fireplace recedes into the background as the camera approaches the back corner of the room, passing a tall wooden cabinet on the right.

events.description: ghost reappears standing near the wall with portrait frames, observing the surroundings

agents.ego_description: approaching the back wall with the Gryffindor banner, turning to observe the ghost and portrait frames

notable_agents.action: ghost standing near the stone wall looking at the portrait frames, semi-transparent and glowing slightly

entered.detail: large red banner with 'GRYFFINDOR' embroidered in gold hanging on the stone wall
collection of framed portraits and paintings in oval and rectangular frames on the stone wall
wrought iron lantern with glowing light hanging from the ceiling beam

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a narrower corridor area where a large 'GRYFFINDOR' banner hangs prominently on the wall. The ghost reappears standing near portrait frames on the right, while the camera turns to face the back wall, leaving the main hall and windows behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic common room that transitions from a wide, open hall into a narrower, more intimate study corridor. It begins by gliding past a large metal armillary sphere and a translucent ghost, moving toward students gathered near tall, light-filled gothic windows. As the camera advances deeper into the room, the armillary sphere recedes and the view opens up to a central study table with an antique globe and a massive stone fireplace adorned with red and gold banners. The perspective then shifts left to circle the fireplace and its surrounding leather armchairs, passing through a quiet study area where students read at wooden tables under the glow of the windows. Finally, the camera moves past a tall wooden cabinet toward a narrower corridor, where a prominent Gryffindor banner and the reappearing ghost mark the transition away from the main hall.
